    • getId

      public String getId()
      Description copied from interface: IIndexer
      Returns the unique id of this indexer. The string returned must be the full id of the indexer i.e., its plug-in id + its local id as declared in extension point org.rodinp.core.indexers.
      Returns:
      the unique id of this indexer
